headline: Ecolab Schedules Webcast and Conference Call on April 28, 2026
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., March 17, 2026--Ecolab will host a live webcast to discuss its first quarter 2026 results. A news release containing first quarter results is expected to be issued before market open on April 28, 2026.

headline: Top Chemicals Stocks to Watch: ECL, EMN, and BCC
summary: Not every chemicals and materials stock is created equal. Some are firing on all cylinders with record results and confident forward guidance. Others are grinding through a rough patch, leaning on cost cuts to stay afloat. Here’s how Ecolab (NYSE:ECL), Eastman Chemical (NYSE:EMN), and Boise Cascade (NYSE:BCC) stack up right now, ranked from third to ... Top Chemicals Stocks to Watch: ECL, EMN, and BCC
